languages.text:
If the user moved during their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, for every 10 points of PERB, a Tactical Simulacrum appears in a random adjacent cell.
A Tactical Simulacrum's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are equal to 1, and it cannot {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, block, or take {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g}.
An enemy that destroys a Tactical Simulacrum suffers +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} stacks of {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploit{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
If the user moved during their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, for every 10 points of PERB, a Tactical Simulacrum appears in a random adjacent cell.
A Tactical Simulacrum's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are equal to 1, and it cannot {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, block, or take {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g}.
An enemy that destroys a Tactical Simulacrum suffers +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} stacks of {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploit{/g}.

languages.text:
If the user moved during their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, for every 10 points of their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} bonus, 1 Tactical Simulacrum appears in a random cell, adjacent to their current position.
A Tactical Simulacrum's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are equal to 1, and it cannot {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, block, or take {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g}.
An enemy that destroys a Tactical Simulacrum suffers +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} stacks of {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploit{/g}.
languages.original_text:
If the user moved during their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, for every 10 points of PERB, a Tactical Simulacrum appears in a random adjacent cell.
A Tactical Simulacrum's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are equal to 1, and it cannot {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, block, or take {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g}.
An enemy that destroys a Tactical Simulacrum suffers +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} stacks of {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploit{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
If the user moved during their turn, for each stack of fatigued on them, a Tactical Simulacrum appears in a random cell, adjacent to the user's current position.
A Tactical Simulacrum has wounds equal to 1 and cannot dodge, parry, or block attacks or take cover.
An enemy that destroys a Tactical Simulacrum suffers +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} stacks of exploit.

If the user moved during their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, for every 10 points of their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} bonus, 1 Tactical Simulacrum appears in a random cell, adjacent to their current position.
A Tactical Simulacrum's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are equal to 1, and it cannot {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, block, or take {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g}.
An enemy that destroys a Tactical Simulacrum suffers +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} stacks of {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploit{/g}.

If the user moved during their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, for every 10 points of their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} bonus, a Tactical Simulacrum appears in a random adjacent cell.
A Tactical Simulacrum's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are equal to 1, and it cannot {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, block, or take {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g}.
An enemy that destroys a Tactical Simulacrum suffers +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} stacks of {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploit{/g}.

languages.text:
Если обладатель аугмента перемещался в свой {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ход{/g}, за каждые 10 единиц его бонуса {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Восприятия{/g} на случайной соседней клетке появляется 1 тактический симулякр.
Его {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровье{/g} равно 1; он не может {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклоняться{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}парировать{/g} и блокировать атаки и прятаться в {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}укрытии{/g}.
Противник, уничтоживший тактический симулякр, получает число уровней {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}уязвимости{/g}, равное {unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus}.
languages.original_text:
If the user moved during their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, for every 10 points of their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} bonus, 1 Tactical Simulacrum appears in a random cell, adjacent to their current position.
A Tactical Simulacrum's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are equal to 1, and it cannot {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, block, or take {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g}.
An enemy that destroys a Tactical Simulacrum suffers +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} stacks of {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploit{/g}.

Если обладатель аугмента перемещался в свой {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ход{/g}, за каждые 10 единиц его бонуса {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Восприятия{/g} на случайной соседней клетке появляется 1 тактический симулякр.
Его {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровье{/g} равно 1; он не может {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклоняться{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}парировать{/g} и блокировать атаки и прятаться в{g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}укрытии{/g}.

languages.text:
Si el usuario se ha movido durante su {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, por 10 puntos de bonificación por {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Percepción{/g} que tenga aparecerá un simulacro táctico en una casilla adyacente al azar a su posición actual.
Un simulacro táctico solo tiene 1 {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}herida{/g} y no puede realizar acciones de {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquiva{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parada{/g} ni bloqueo, ni tampoco puede {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cubrirse{/g}.
Si un enemigo destruye un simulacro táctico, sufre +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} acumulaciones de {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}vulnerabilidad{/g}.
languages.original_text:
If the user moved during their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, for every 10 points of their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} bonus, 1 Tactical Simulacrum appears in a random cell, adjacent to their current position.
A Tactical Simulacrum's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are equal to 1, and it cannot {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, block, or take {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g}.
An enemy that destroys a Tactical Simulacrum suffers +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} stacks of {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploit{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Si el usuario se ha movido durante su {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, por 10 puntos de bonificación por {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Percepción{/g} que tenga aparecerá un simulacro táctico en una casilla adyacente al azar a su posición actual.
Un simulacro táctico solo tiene 1 {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}herida{/g} y no puede realizar acciones de {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquiva{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parada{/g} ni bloqueo, ni tampoco puede {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cubrirse{/g}.
Si un enemigo destruye un simulacro táctico, sufre +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} acumulaciones de {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}vulnerabilidad{/g}.

languages.text:
Hat sich der Nutzer während seines {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} bewegt, erscheint für jeweils 10 Punkte seines {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Wahrnehmungsbonus{/g} ein Taktisches Simulakrum auf einem Nachbarfeld.
Ein Taktisches Simulakrum hat 1 {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Wunde{/g}. Es kann nicht {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}ausweichen{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parieren{/g}, blocken oder in {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}Deckung{/g} gehen.
Ein Gegner, der ein Taktisches Simulakrum zerstört, wird mit +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} Stapeln {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}Ausnutzen{/g} belegt.
languages.original_text:
If the user moved during their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, for every 10 points of their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} bonus, 1 Tactical Simulacrum appears in a random cell, adjacent to their current position.
A Tactical Simulacrum's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are equal to 1, and it cannot {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, block, or take {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g}.
An enemy that destroys a Tactical Simulacrum suffers +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} stacks of {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploit{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Hat sich der Nutzer während seines {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} bewegt, erscheint für jeweils 10 Punkte seines {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Wahrnehmungsbonus{/g} ein Taktisches Simulakrum auf einem Nachbarfeld.
Ein Taktisches Simulakrum hat 1 {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Wunde{/g}. Es kann nicht {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}ausweichen{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parieren{/g}, blocken oder in {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}Deckung{/g} gehen.
Ein Gegner, der ein Taktisches Simulakrum zerstört, wird mit +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} Stapeln {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}Ausnutzen{/g} belegt.

languages.text:
Si l’utilisateur s'est déplacé pendant son {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}, pour chaque tranche de 10 points de bonus de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}, un simulacre tactique supplémentaire apparaît sur une case aléatoire adjacente à sa position actuelle.
Les {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}blessures{/g} du simulacre sont égales à 1 et il ne peut ni {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquiver{/g} ni {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parer{/g} ni bloquer ni se {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}mettre à couvert{/g}.
Un ennemi qui détruit un simulacre tactique subit +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} cumuls de {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}Vulnérabilité{/g}.
languages.original_text:
If the user moved during their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, for every 10 points of their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} bonus, 1 Tactical Simulacrum appears in a random cell, adjacent to their current position.
A Tactical Simulacrum's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are equal to 1, and it cannot {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, block, or take {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g}.
An enemy that destroys a Tactical Simulacrum suffers +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} stacks of {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploit{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Si l’utilisateur s'est déplacé pendant son {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}, pour chaque tranche de 10 points de bonus de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}, un simulacre tactique supplémentaire apparaît sur une case aléatoire adjacente à sa position actuelle.
Les {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}blessures{/g} du simulacre sont égales à 1 et il ne peut ni {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquiver{/g} ni {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parer{/g} ni bloquer ni se {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}mettre à couvert{/g}.
Un ennemi qui détruit un simulacre tactique subit +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} cumuls de {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}Vulnérabilité{/g}.

languages.text:
Kullanıcı, {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turu{/g} esnasında hareket ederse üzerindeki her 10 puanlık {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Algı{/g} bonusu için mevcut konumunun bitişiğindeki rastgele bir hücrede 1 Taktiksel Simulakrum belirir.
Taktiksel Simulakrum'un {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}sağlık{/g} puanı 1'dir. {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}Kaçınma{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}savuşturma{/g}, bloklama yapamaz ve {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}siper{/g} alamaz.
Bir Taktiksel Simulakrum'u imha eden düşman, +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}sömürü{/g} birikimine maruz kalır.
languages.original_text:
If the user moved during their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, for every 10 points of their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} bonus, 1 Tactical Simulacrum appears in a random cell, adjacent to their current position.
A Tactical Simulacrum's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are equal to 1, and it cannot {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, block, or take {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g}.
An enemy that destroys a Tactical Simulacrum suffers +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} stacks of {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploit{/g}.

Kullanıcı, {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turu{/g} esnasında hareket ederse üzerindeki her 10 puanlık {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Algı{/g} bonusu için mevcut konumunun bitişiğindeki rastgele bir hücrede 1 Taktiksel Simulakrum belirir.
Taktiksel Simulakrum'un {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}sağlık{/g} puanı 1'dir. {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}Kaçınma{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}savuşturma{/g}, bloklama yapamaz ve {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}siper{/g} alamaz.
Bir Taktiksel Simulakrum'u imha eden düşman, +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}sömürü{/g} birikimine maruz kalır.

languages.text:
使用者若在其{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}移动过，其身上每有10点{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}感知{/g}加值，便会在1个随机相邻格子上生成1个战术幻象。
战术幻象的{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}生命值{/g}为1，且无法{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}招架{/g}、格挡或进入{g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}掩体{/g}。
摧毁战术幻象的敌人会承受{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus}层{g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}研究{/g}效果。
languages.original_text:
If the user moved during their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, for every 10 points of their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} bonus, 1 Tactical Simulacrum appears in a random cell, adjacent to their current position.
A Tactical Simulacrum's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are equal to 1, and it cannot {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, block, or take {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g}.

使用者若在其{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}移动过，其身上每有10点{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}感知{/g}加值，便会在1个随机相邻格子上生成1个战术幻象。
战术幻象的{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}生命值{/g}为1，且无法{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}招架{/g}、格挡或进入{g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}掩体{/g}。
摧毁战术幻象的敌人会承受{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus}层{g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}研究{/g}效果。

languages.text:
使用者が{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}中に移動した場合、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}知覚{/g}ボーナス10ポイントごとに、戦術シミュラクラムがランダムな隣接マスに出現する。
戦術シミュラクラムの{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}負傷{/g}は1に等しく、{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}回避{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}受け流し{/g}、ブロック、{g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}遮蔽{/g}を取ることができない。
戦術シミュラクラムを破壊した敵は{g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}エクスプロイト{/g}を+{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus}スタック受ける。
